categoryDescription: SCuBA baseline checks for additional Google Workspace services: Google Sites, Google Classroom, and Gemini for Workspace. Settings are read from the Cloud Identity Policy API where exposed; controls the API does not surface are reported as Not Assessed with Admin console verification guidance.

checks.name: Sites Service Disabled
checks.description: The Google Sites service should be disabled for all users to reduce attack surface, consistent with least-privilege. Sites can be enabled selectively per organizational unit or group where there is a documented need.
checks.recommendedValue: Sites service OFF for everyone (enable selectively per OU/group only as needed)
checks.remediationSteps: Admin Console > Apps > Google Workspace > Sites > Service status > Set to OFF for everyone. Enable selectively per organizational unit or group only where a documented business need exists.

checks.name: Classroom Membership - Who Can Join Classes
checks.description: Who can join classes in your domain should be restricted to users in your domain only, preventing external accounts from joining internal classes.
checks.recommendedValue: Who can join classes set to 'Users in your domain only'
checks.remediationSteps: Admin Console > Apps > Additional Google services > Classroom > Class settings > About class membership > Who can join classes in your domain > Set to 'Users in your domain only'.

checks.name: Classroom Membership - Which Classes Users Can Join
checks.description: Which classes users in your domain can join should be restricted to classes in your domain only, preventing internal users from joining external classes that could exfiltrate data.
checks.recommendedValue: Which classes users can join set to 'Classes in your domain only'
checks.remediationSteps: Admin Console > Apps > Additional Google services > Classroom > Class settings > About class membership > Which classes users in your domain can join > Set to 'Classes in your domain only'.

checks.name: Classroom API Data Access Restricted
checks.description: Users should not be able to authorize third-party apps to access their Google Classroom data, preventing uncontrolled data access by external integrations.
checks.recommendedValue: Users cannot authorize apps to access Classroom data (API data access disabled)
checks.remediationSteps: Admin Console > Apps > Additional Google services > Classroom > Data access > Uncheck 'Users can authorize apps to access their Google Classroom data'.

checks.name: Classroom Roster Import Disabled
checks.description: Roster import via third-party integration should be turned off so that class rosters are not synced from external systems without explicit governance.
checks.remediationSteps: Admin Console > Apps > Additional Google services > Classroom > Roster import > Select OFF.

checks.name: Classroom Student Unenrollment Restricted
checks.description: Only teachers should be allowed to unenroll students from classes, preventing students from removing themselves or others and disrupting class membership integrity.
checks.recommendedValue: Student unenrollment restricted to teachers only
checks.remediationSteps: Admin Console > Apps > Additional Google services > Classroom > Student unenrollment > Select 'Teachers only'.

checks.name: Classroom Class Creation Restricted to Verified Teachers
checks.description: Class creation should be restricted to verified teachers only, preventing unauthorized users from creating classes and gathering members.
checks.recommendedValue: Class creation restricted to verified teachers only
checks.remediationSteps: Admin Console > Apps > Additional Google services > Classroom > General settings > Teacher permissions > Select 'Verified teachers only'.

checks.name: Gemini App Access Restricted to Licensed Users
checks.description: Gemini app user access should be set to OFF for everyone without a license, ensuring generative-AI access is governed by license assignment rather than open to all users.
checks.recommendedValue: Gemini app access OFF for users without a license
checks.remediationSteps: Admin Console > Generative AI > Gemini app > User access > Uncheck 'Allow all users to access the Gemini app, regardless of license'.

checks.name: Gemini Alpha Features Disabled
checks.description: Gemini Alpha features should be disabled. Pre-release features may not have completed security review and can expose organizational data to unvetted processing.
checks.recommendedValue: Access to Alpha features in Gemini for Workspace turned off
checks.remediationSteps: Admin Console > Generative AI > Gemini for Workspace > Alpha features > Select 'Turn off access to Alpha features in Gemini for Google Workspace'.

checks.name: Gemini Conversation History Enabled
checks.description: Gemini conversation history should be enabled so that AI interactions are retained for audit and compliance purposes. Disabled history can conceal data handling.
checks.remediationSteps: Admin Console > Generative AI > Gemini app > Gemini conversation history > Ensure conversation history is turned on.

checks.name: Gemini Conversation Retention Minimum 18 Months
checks.description: Gemini conversation retention should be set to a minimum of 18 months to support audit, legal-hold, and incident-investigation requirements.
checks.recommendedValue: Conversation retention set to at least 18 months
checks.remediationSteps: Admin Console > Generative AI > Gemini app > Gemini conversation history > Set the retention period to at least 18 months.

checks.name: Gemini Conversation Sharing Disabled
checks.description: Gemini conversation sharing via link should be set to OFF to prevent AI conversation content, which may include sensitive prompts and outputs, from being shared outside intended recipients.
checks.recommendedValue: Conversation sharing via link set to OFF
checks.remediationSteps: Admin Console > Generative AI > Gemini app > Sharing > Set 'Allow conversation sharing via link' to OFF.
